message:
feat(tests): add E2E concurrency tests for SQLite locking

Implement tests for SQLite lock handling and concurrency semantics:
- Concurrent writes succeed with retry on lock contention
- Lock timeout behavior with low timeouts
- Concurrent read operations complete without blocking
- Write serialization across multiple threads
- Mixed read-write concurrency
- Lock error reporting verification
- Timing assertions for lock operations

Closes beads_rust-uahy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
